name: ground-slow-move-fast-navigation
description: Dual-system foundation model for generalizable vision-and-language navigation
content:
## Dual-System Foundation for VLN

### Core Concept

This skill implements techniques from paper arXiv:2512.08186 for improving agent reasoning, adaptation, and decision-making in complex tasks.

### Implementation

See paper for implementation details: https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.08186

### Practical Guidance

Key techniques from this paper can enhance agent capabilities in:
- Reasoning under uncertainty
- Adaptive learning
- Multi-step planning
- Robustness and generalization

Refer to the paper's methodology sections for specific implementation guidance.
